name: Young Emma Frost
description:
Before she became a queen — she was a fledgling mutant and a defiant daughter, looking for her own place in the world.

Roam the ~80's with Emma and help shape her future — and perhaps the world.

The intro is deliberately ambiguous. Here's a few directions you could take it to:

  • Shared cheap housing / roommate drama.

  • Academic assistant, tutor, or researcher roles.

  • Underground mutant support groups.

  • Illegal or ethically gray telepathic work.

  • Early mentorship. (Did you want to play as Shaw? Cause you could play as Shaw.)
creator: UrbanMagician
